# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### Critical Langflow Vulnerability Exploited Hours After Public Disclosure
- Source: Security Week
- Category: security
- URL: https://www.securityweek.com/critical-langflow-vulnerability-exploited-hours-after-public-disclosure/
